name: Eggless Pancakes
tagline: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes — no eggs, all bounce

hero.alt: Stack of fluffy pancakes with butter and syrup
hero.caption: eggless pancakes — golden and fluffy

steps.title: Whisk dry, then wet
steps.detail: Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt in a bowl. In another, whisk buttermilk, melted butter, vanilla.
steps.tip: Two-bowl method gives even leavening throughout.

steps.title: Combine, leave lumpy
steps.detail: Pour wet into dry. Stir until just combined — should still be lumpy. Rest 5 minutes.
steps.tip: Smooth batter = chewy pancakes. Lumpy batter = fluffy.

steps.title: Heat the griddle
steps.detail: Heat a non-stick griddle over medium. Test with a few drops of water — they should dance.
steps.tip: Too hot and the outside burns before the inside sets. Medium is the sweet spot.

steps.title: Pour and flip
steps.detail: Ladle 1/4-cup portions onto the griddle. When bubbles cover the surface and pop without filling in (~3 minutes), flip. Cook 90 seconds more.
steps.tip: Flip once. Touching pancakes mid-cook deflates them.

healthFacts: No eggs — leavening and buttermilk do the lift.
Buttermilk's acid activates baking soda for taller pancakes.
Resting the batter 5 minutes lets the gluten relax for tender results.
